meta.title: AllyOS Peptide Stack Families — clean goal-driven taxonomy (DRAFT)
meta.source: Physician-authored clean taxonomy (Falcon, MD). Supersedes the prior overlapping stack roster. Flow: client goal → family → choose 2/3/4 peptides → match IV/IM support.
meta.curated_by: Armando A. Falcon, MD (FL ME 84789) — RenuviaMD® PLLC, AllyOS Compliance Division
meta.scope: 9 mutually-exclusive stack families, each with 2-/3-/4-peptide builds. Each links to the IV/IM ingredient support matrix in peptide-iv-support.json. No overlap, no repeated combinations.
meta.principle: Client goal → peptide family → choose 2 / 3 / 4 peptides → then match IV/IM support ingredients. Consent tier = highest-grade component (per peptide-module grade→tier). Advisory; provider selects and prescribes; no efficacy/synergy claims.

new_peptides_needing_monograph.note: These appear in the 4-peptide (and some 3-peptide) builds but are NOT yet in the locked peptide library (contraindications.json / peptide-module). Author monographs (grade, consent tier, contraindications, monitoring) before these builds are clinically usable.

families.name: Metabolic / GLP / Body-Composition
families.goal: weight loss, appetite control, metabolic support, body composition
families.anchor_rule: GLP/GIP anchor = choose ONE only: semaglutide, tirzepatide, or retatrutide.
iv_im_match: beauty support if weight-loss aesthetic goal

families.name: GH / Lean Mass / Recovery
families.goal: recovery, lean support, sleep/recovery, body composition
families.clinical_note: Tesamorelin is the strongest GH-axis anchor; CJC-1295 / ipamorelin / sermorelin are common wellness GH-axis options.

families.name: Mitochondrial / Energy / Longevity
families.goal: energy, fatigue recovery, mitochondrial support, longevity wellness

families.name: Repair / Injury / Connective-Tissue
families.goal: tendon/joint support, injury recovery, connective tissue, training recovery
iv_im_match: magnesium if cramps/recovery and renal screen clear
families.contra_union: active/prior malignancy (all pro-angiogenic), pregnancy, lactation, age <18, hypersensitivity; GHK-Cu adds cumulative-copper / Wilson caution

families.name: Skin / Hair / Glow / Aesthetic
families.goal: skin quality, glow, collagen support, hair/nails, post-weight-loss aesthetics
families.note: Biotin allowed for wellness hair/nail goals; deficiency NOT required, but WARN about lab-test interference (troponin/thyroid).

families.name: Sexual Vitality / HPG Axis
families.goal: libido, sexual vitality, arousal support, HPG-axis wellness
iv_im_match: magnesium if stress/tension phenotype and safe
families.safety_gate: BP/HR matters with the PT-141 / bremelanotide axis (uncontrolled HTN / CVD are label contraindications).

families.name: Neuro / Focus / Calm / Sleep
families.goal: focus, calm, stress recovery, sleep quality, neuro-wellness
families.language_guardrail: Do NOT claim treatment of anxiety, ADHD, insomnia, depression, or cognitive disease.

families.name: Immune / Inflammatory Wellness
families.goal: immune wellness, inflammatory balance, post-viral wellness support, resilience
families.safety_gate: Active infection, fever, hypoxia, confusion, or sepsis symptoms = DO NOT infuse; medical evaluation.

families.name: Non-GLP Fat-Loss / Metabolic Wellness
families.goal: fat-loss wellness, metabolic support, energy, body-composition support WITHOUT a GLP anchor
iv_im_match: Niagen/NR or NAD+ if energy/mitochondrial goal
families.language_guardrail: No 'fat melting'; no guaranteed fat loss.

supersedes: The prior loose stack roster in peptide-iv-support.json (stacks.list) and workspace.html stack monographs. Migrate those to these 9 families. Closes the prior coverage gaps: Sexual/HPG = FAM_6, Neuro/Cognitive = FAM_7, Immune = FAM_8.

signoff_ledger.status: DRAFT — clean 9-family taxonomy; pending new-peptide monographs, IV/IM match wiring, 3-auditor lock + MD sign-off.
pending: Author monographs for new peptides (cagrilintide, Humanin, oxytocin, LL-37, thymulin) before their builds are clinically usable.
Assign each family a consent-tier rule (= highest-grade component, per peptide-module grade→tier).
Wire each family's iv_im_match to the peptide-iv-support ingredient IDs + safety delegation.
Migrate workspace.html stack monographs to the family structure (and add the Repair Stack monograph).
